violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2025

Sushi was observed held at 49-54 degrees Fahrenheit in the sushi open-air cooler. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per person in charge, sushi was transferred to the open-air cooler about 2 hours ago. Sushi was relocated to freezer to rapidly cool. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/10/2025

Reduced oxygen packaged (ROP) seafood (imitation crab and tuna) were observed thawed with the package intact. ROP seafood must be completely removed from the package when thawing. Imitation crab was observed held at 42 degrees Fahrenheit during time of inspection. Imitation crab was voluntarily disposed of at time of inspection (see attached disposal form). Tuna was observed stored at 37 degrees Fahrenheit during time of inspection. Tuna was removed from the package during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/10/2025

The sushi open-air cooler had an ambient air temperature ranging from 40-47 degrees Fahrenheit during time of inspection. Sushi open-air cooler was taken out of service and must not be used until it can maintain an internal food temperature of 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below. Sushi open-air cooler must be repaired/replaced/adjusted. New Violation. Correct By: 07/10/2025

Chemicals were stored hanging on the edge of shelving used to store equipment/single service articles in the. Chemicals are to be stored in a way to prevent possible contamination of foods/equipment/single service articles. (Chemicals were moved at the time of inspection.) Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/24/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving unit behind the display case were observed to have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/24/2023
